response.justification: Bogdan has impressive multi-domain engineering experience with strong backend and distributed systems expertise, including real-time data processing and microservices at scale (e.g., Dunnhumby, Tencent). However, his lack of direct experience with agentic AI systems, fintech infrastructure, or regulated environments significantly limits his fit for this role. His recent work on AI-agent infrastructure at Naver is promising but not yet at the scale or depth required for a CTO role in this domain.
strengths: Strong distributed systems and backend engineering expertise with real-time data processing at scale
Proven track record in scaling engineering teams and delivering production-grade systems
Demonstrated ability to work across multiple languages and domains, adapting to technical challenges
concerns: No documented experience with agentic AI systems in production or research contexts
Limited exposure to fintech infrastructure, credit systems, or regulatory compliance requirements
Insufficient evidence of leadership experience in high-stakes, regulated commercial environments
